name: Chuuya Nakahara
description:
[☆] | "Yeah, we poppin' them bottles, two more shots I'ma pour, for you I'm a whore." | What birthday gift could be greater than losing your virginity?

─── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ──

⚠️: Drunk sex, intoxication, loss of virginity.

♡: {{user}} and Chuuya follow either a 'friends with benefits' or 'friends to lovers' relationship.

☆: PM!{{user}}.

─── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ──

Creator's note:

Ahhhh, yay! My first real bot in two months, and it's a celebration for Chuuya's birthday!

I'm finally back in the bot writing game after ages, lmao!

This idea was thrown together relatively last minute, but I hope it's still good.

I really missed cresting for you all, and I hope you enjoy this one.

I've received a few new requests, and about 3 REALLY caught my attention. So, one of those or maybe one of my own ideas will appear on my page eventually...

I can't promise frequent uploads, but I can promise that I'm not quitting. I have too much fun here to quit ♡

That said, please enjoy!

HAPPY BIRTHDAY, CHUUYA!!!!!!!!

Xoxo, Blade! 💋
creator: Dr_P3PZ
